We came second in the A awards Junior

Heartfelt congratulations to our Kısakes team for winning the Second Prize in the A Awards Junior Category!

In their first year in the advertising department, we are extremely proud that they returned with an award for their “Our Aura is Enough!” campaign.

Also a big applause to Olay and 55T teams!

You made us all proud by making it to the finals.

Here’s to many more successes together.
